case_title: AHRENKIEL, SHARI LYNN GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR et al vs. CHUN, SHAN LINN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 998 OFFER AND ACCEPTANCE ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AHRENKIEL, SHARI LYNN GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR RODRIGUEZ, JOSEPH RITO A MINOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUN, SHAN LINN $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, ADDITIONAL TERMS- SEE FULL TEXT OF JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS. THIS IS COMPROMISE OF MINOR'S CLAIM PER CCP 372 AND PROB C 3600 ET SEQ.
